description_long: This is a military-style, single-propeller airplane with a high-wing configuration and a camouflage paint scheme. The fuselage is slender and streamlined, with a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit featuring clear canopy windows. The wings are straight and mounted above the fuselage, supported by struts, and the tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer with a cross insignia. The landing gear is fixed and of the taildragger type, with two main wheels and a small tail wheel. The exterior appears to be primarily metal with some glass components for the cockpit and possibly rubber for the tires.
description: A military-style, high-wing, single-propeller airplane with camouflage paint, a forward enclosed cockpit, and fixed taildragger landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the high-mounted straight wings, forward propeller, and fixed landing gear.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the camouflage pattern, straight wing span, and tail cross insignia.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail section, vertical stabilizer, and the structure of the landing gear.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the undercarriage, fixed main wheels, and tail wheel.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with external strut bracing and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single forward-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
